case_title: CCSF TAX TREASURER COLLECTOR VS. DAVID COUGHLIN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-06-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-06-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF CCSF TAX TREASUER COLLECTOR IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY CHARLENE HASTINGS, SENIOR COLLECTIONS OFFICE. DEFENDANT DAVID COUGHLIN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,418.40 FILED BY CCSF TAX TREASURER COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT COUGHLIN, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-06-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF TAX TREASURER COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COUGHLIN, DAVID $3,418.40 PRINCIPAL, $195.97 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,614.37 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF TAX TREASURER COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT COUGHLIN, DAVID
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF TAX TREASURER COLLECTOR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-06-2017 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $145.97) SERVED DEC-13-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT COUGHLIN, DAVID
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, [ABSTRACT FILED IN NEVADA COUNTY] AS TO DEFENDANT COUGHLIN, DAVID
